name: Milana
message:
Dear Riya,

Happy Birthday! 🎉
Wishing you a beautiful day filled with joy, love, and wonderful moments. May this new year of your life bring you happiness, good health, and many dreams coming true.

You are a lovely part of the family, and I’m very happy that Abhi has such a caring and wonderful wife. May your life together always be full of understanding, laughter, and blessings.

With warm wishes on your special day.

Love,
Milana
(Abhi’s sister)

name: Parveen yadav
message: Happy birthday dear Riya I wish you abundance of love , good luck and happiness . Keep shining and growing in every field of life . Tum jiyo hazaron Saal saal k din ho pachaas Hazaar

name: Madhu & Ajay
message:
🌸🌷🌼🌺🌻🌹🌸🌷🌼🌺🌻🌹

🎂 मेरी प्यारी बेटी रिया के नाम
जन्मदिन की ढेर सारी शुभकामनाएँ 💐

🌸🌷🌼🌺🌻🌹🌸🌷🌼🌺🌻🌹

प्रिय रिया,

जिस दिन तुमने हमारे जीवन में कदम रखा,
उस दिन हमारे घर में खुशियों के फूल खिल उठे।

तुम्हारी मुस्कान हमारे जीवन का सबसे सुंदर उपहार है।
तुम्हारा बचपन, तुम्हारी शरारतें और तुम्हारी मासूमियत
हमारी सबसे अनमोल यादें हैं।

आज तुम अपने जीवन के एक नए पड़ाव पर हो,
और यह तुम्हारा शादी के बाद पहला जन्मदिन है।

ईश्वर तुम्हारे जीवन को
खुशियों, प्रेम, सम्मान और सफलता के
सुंदर फूलों से हमेशा महकाता रहे।

🌹🌸 जन्मदिन की बहुत-बहुत शुभकामनाएँ 🌸🌹

💐 Mummy, Daddy और Keshav की ओर से ढेर सारा प्यार 💐

🌺🌷🌼🌻🌹🌸🌷🌼🌻🌺🌹

name: Pradeep and Katerina
message:
Dear Riya, 
Wishing you a very Happy Birthday!
May this special day bring you joy, love, and beautiful moments.
May your life always be blessed with happiness, prosperity, good health, and the warmth of your wonderful family with wonderful Abhi. May each new year bring more success, peace, and fulfillment into your life.
Wishing you a truly wonderful BIRTHDAY filled with blessings and happiness.

Mamaji and Mamiji

name: Dr Narender Singh
message:
Happy Birthday, dear daughter-in-law. 🎂  Riya
You are not just my son’s wife, but a precious daughter to our family. Your kindness, love, and care bring happiness to our home every day.  

May God bless you with good health, success, and endless joy in life. May all your dreams come true and your life always be filled with love and laughter.  

Wishing you a wonderful birthday and a beautiful year ahead. 🎉

name: Niti Keerthy
message: Hi Riya. Wish you a wonderful 28th birthday! You have brought in so much joy and happiness in the family more like a daughter than a daughter-in-law. May god give you a happy, healthy and prosperous life. Stay blessed!

name: Praveen Keerthy
message: Many happy returns of the day Riya! You are a wonderful addition to our family and Abhi is lucky to have you as his life partner. Really appreciate the positive energy you bring when you're around. Have a great life ahead both you you.

name: Atul & Komal
message:
"Happy Happy Birthday! Many many happy returns of the day!
I wanted to send a warm wish your way and once again thank you for being such a wonderful part of our wedding. Your energy and support meant so much to us, and I hope your birthday is filled with that same joy and excitement!" and I’m really looking forward to us all spending more time together and having many more such happy occasions to celebrate in future!"
